components.text:
The spiritual variety looks identical to decorative jade to an untrained eye. It took me some time to learn to feel the difference reliably.
Treasure rats are drawn to it. I have lost more than I care to admit.

Jade takes Qi impressions well and can be shaped by intent in ways ordinary stone cannot. The one confirmed use I have found is in the Ender Pouch — the jade holds the spatial link stable. Nuggets for fine work; full pieces where the recipe demands it.
